name: my-app
initializeCommand: (git config --get user.name || echo 'Developer') > .devcontainer/.git_name && (git config --get user.email || echo 'dev@example.com') > .devcontainer/.git_email && clear
postCreateCommand: git config --global url."https://github.com/".insteadOf git@github.com: && git config --global user.name "$(cat .devcontainer/.git_name)" && git config --global user.email "$(cat .devcontainer/.git_email)" && rm .devcontainer/.git_name .devcontainer/.git_email && clear
